channel.title: Book on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)
channel.description: Recent content in Book on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)

item.title: CS Dream
item.description: CS Dream is a open book that introduces computer science to the general audience. The book discusses general topics such as the usage of search engines, places to find books, and the importance of English. In addition, it also introduces several courses that are usually taught at the universities. The courses covered include Assembly Language, Discrete Mathematics, Cryptography, etc.
